programme.title: PARTNER
programme.desc: The Movie Club

programme.title: Masti
programme.desc: Three henpecked friends tired of their respective marriage decide to spice up their lives by indulging in an extramarital affair. But things go downhill very quickly when they become the prime suspects in a deadly murder case.

programme.title: Pyare Mohan
programme.desc: A blind man Pyare and his deaf friend Mohan fall in love with twin sisters Preeti and Priya. But their relationships spiral into chaos when the sisters get falsely implicated in a murder case and the men have to find a way to save them.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: When a girl becomes a victim of acid attack, her mild-mannered brother Dev is enraged. He takes the law in his own hands to teach a lesson not only to her attacker but also to those who victimised other girls in the past in a similar manner.

programme.title: Renigunta
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: ORU KUPRASIDHA PAYYAN
programme.desc: Ajayan, an introverted young man, feels helpless when he is accused of murdering an old woman until Hannah, a novice yet astute lawyer, comes to his rescue.

programme.title: D Block
programme.desc: A young engineering student along with his friends unravels the mystery around his college where several girls go missing and dead.

programme.title: Chor Pe Mor
programme.desc: Chor Pe Mor (1990) crime drama: A poor man gets robbery money, facing threats from crooks and cops while saving love.

programme.title: Naqab
programme.desc: Photographer Imran visits Alipur for an assignment but is haunted by a mysterious woman only he can see—real or illusion?

programme.title: Kalyug Ke Avtaar
programme.desc: Millionaire Pratap accepts his son's love, but Babli's brother, who hates the rich, vows to stop them.

programme.title: Astitva
programme.desc: The movie follows the story of Aditi, a devoted wife, who discovers her husband's infidelity. As she confronts her husband and delves deeper into the truth, she begins to question her own identity and place in society.

programme.title: Ilaka (peddupettai)
programme.desc: Crime drama about Kumar, a man who rises from a slum to become a powerful figure in the underworld after witnessing his mother's murder. Driven by ambition and vengeance, he navigates betrayal and crime.

programme.title: Raju Chacha
programme.desc: Raju is hired to pose as uncle to three orphaned kids in order to usurp their inheritance. But he changes his mind after falling in love with their governess and decides to fight the greedy relatives.

programme.title: Raja Taqatwar

programme.title: Naanu Nan Jaanu Baduke Chanda Innu
programme.desc: 2021 Kannada romantic drama by Sri Hari, starring Ruthvika Shetty & Srujan Lokesh music by Kashyap

programme.title: Trust No 1
programme.desc: Officer Bradley (Douglas Rouillard) investigates murders believed to be part of a serial killing and quickly learns it's much bigger. With the body count rising, and nothing adding up, he turns to his last resort for help, his brother.

programme.title: It's Fixer upper
programme.desc: When The Dovers (Louise Dylan and Sean Wing) find themselves in financial jeopardy, they turn to Dan's parents' (Dee Wallace and Gary Neal Johnson) for help. His father thinks it is time for his son to learn some life lessons.

programme.title: Born To Race Fast Track
programme.desc: Danny Krueger is a twenty-year old street racer who plays by his own rules. After winning a scholarship to the prestigious Fast Lane Racing Academy, Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on and off the track, and a terrible incident leaves Danny without a racing partner. Facing dismissal from the academy, Danny is forced to team up with an old rival. The pair must learn to set aside their differences as they vie for rookie spots on a professional racing team.

programme.title: Life after life
programme.desc: When journalist Masha finally gives up trying to find happiness with Dmitry, an older man who was also her boss, she falls for the much younger Yuri Kozakov - handsome, attentive and seemingly wealthy. But after a hasty marriage, Masha soon begins to notices strange things about Yuri's lifestyle and behaviour. When Yuri leaves for a business trip, Masha hears footsteps in the house and sees a dark shadow in the garden. Soon she will learn Yuri's horrible secret and become threatened by mortal danger, but if she cannot save herself, who will come to her aid in her hour of need?

programme.title: Rosko's Glam Rock! 1971-1974 Rosko's Glam Rock! 1971-1974
programme.desc: Wham bam glam craziness with The Emperor spreading the love from Los Angeles! 3 years of music - 1971 to 1974 - that defined a decade and forged our fabulous fashions!

programme.title: Glam Rock Day! Glam Rock Day!
programme.desc: All day - rewind to a time of big hair, outrageous makeup and platform shoes. The greatest gems of glam pop & rock, including Alvin Stardust, Abba, Slade & Wizzard.

programme.title: Bowie v Bolan! 1970-1974 Bowie v Bolan! 1970-1974
programme.desc: Cool icons of 70s glam go into battle! But who can be the most outrageous?

programme.title: The Complete Elton 70s Videography The Complete Elton 70s Videography
programme.desc: Elton's big hits in order from 1971's "Your Song" to 1979's "Are You Ready For Love". Includes famous live performances and recent official video remakes of all-time classics.

programme.title: Boogie Wonderland! Boogie Wonderland!
programme.desc: If you don't get up and dance, you aren't human! Disco was the best floor show in town & once again it's time to get up & get lost in the pulse!

programme.title: Simon Bates: Disco Inferno! Simon Bates: Disco Inferno!
programme.desc: From the early days when soul gained that disco beat in 1973, to the turn of the decade when Blondie & Diana Ross got in on the act! Simon Bates is your dancefloor host!

programme.title: Sinitta's Everyone I Fancied!
programme.desc: 100 minutes of everyone Sinitta fancied being, or just plain adored in the 80s. Her favourite boys & gorgeous girls in their fiercest videos - you'll fancy them a little bit too!

programme.title: We Love Cheesy Pop Day!
programme.desc: We'd rather jack than Fleetwood Mac! A whole day of 80s celebrities & singalongs, Including Rick Astley, Jason Donovan, Brother Beyond & Bucks Fizz.

programme.title: Did They Think They Could Dance?!
programme.desc: From 1980 to 1989, videos full of self belief - but have their moves stood the test of time? You decide as we bring you 30 clips of dodgy dance and suspect swaying from the 80s!

programme.title: Trev & Simon's Swing Your Pants!
programme.desc: 80s TV funny men Trev & Simon are the perfect hosts to get you in the mood to party, swing some pants, and have a giggle about some of the top pop talent of the decade!

programme.title: Most Weeks in UK Chart? Top 100
programme.desc: Who spent the most weeks in the UK Top 75 during the whole decade? We countdown the Top 100 artists with longevity - all their song weeks combined & surprises are a guarantee!

programme.title: No Intro Needed: The Top 50
programme.desc: 50 tracks we know you know - but how fast can you name them? One thing's for sure: after the first note, you'll be singing them all night long!

programme.title: Party Rock Anthems!
programme.desc: Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.

programme.title: Let's Get Rocked! With Def Leppard
programme.desc: From our sister channel NOW 90s, Def Leppard's lead singer Joe Elliott with a 3 hour journey through the decade - 30 killer tracks hand picked.

programme.title: Perfect Pair
programme.desc: Two voices. One perfect balance. Each pair fills the space with rich, complementary energy—together creating something more.

programme.title: SUPER JUNIOR Unit Music Video Compilation

programme.title: NCT DREAM The 5th Album 'Go Back To The Future' Playlist
programme.desc: 「Go Back To The Future」 reflects on the fact that every step of their journey so far has been without regret, while also reaffirming their identity as “the brightest NCT DREAM” across the past, the present, and the “absolute now.” Fully embracing this moment, the seven members move forward with confidence toward another peak and the next chapter of their story. 7. That Summer 4. DREAM TEAM 9. Beautiful Sailing6. 'Bout You 5. Interlude : Back to Our Paradise [Track List] 1. BTTF 2. CHILLER 8. Miss Me 3. I LIKE IT NCT DREAM once again proves their brightest moment with their 5th full-length album, 「Go Back To The Future」. This album tells the story of the curious and quirky NCT DREAM embarking on a time-travel journey to find their most radiant selves, capturing various events and emotions they experience while traveling through the past, present, and future in nine tracks.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Based in London, Francine Lacqua speaks with guests about global business, economics, finance and politics.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: A uniquely emotional documentary that will touch the heart of audiences around the world. Four female climbers face the sporting challenge of a lifetime as they attempt to compete in the first ever Olympic climbing competition at Tokyo 2020.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj Coster-Waldau begins season two, and we're reminded of the delicate balance between human progress and protecting our planet.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj travels the world to meet people transforming waste into resources showing that waste isn't something to hide -- it's something we can rethink as valuable raw material.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: From transforming concrete into a carbon sink to mining nickel from genetically enhanced plants, we meet the bold inventors preserving and adapting to nature's offerings to help humanity thrive.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Meeting humanity's insatiable demand for energy while still curbing greenhouse emissions will require creative solutions both big and small.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: Alexander Stubb,

programme.desc: Set in the Goryeo dynasty, it tells the story of a young and ambitious monarch Won (Im Si-wan) with a desire to conquer, and two people who shape his destiny childhood friend Wang Rin (Hong Jong-hyun) and a beautiful young woman named San (Im Yoon-ah).

programme.desc: This is a fantasy romance drama about Dan Oh and Ha Ru, who one day find out that they are unimportant characters of a cartoon and change the storyline to make their relationship work out!

programme.title: Medical Top Team
programme.desc: Follows the journey of creating Korea's best multidisciplinary medical team and the stories of doctors inside. Characters who have different hurts and dilemmas struggle as they get to work together and gradually learn that healing a person is healing oneself.

programme.title: My Secret Terrius
programme.desc: Go Ae Rin suddenly loses her husband. A mysterious man, Kim Bon, lives next door. Kim Bon is a legendary NIS agent. He helps Ae Rin uncover a conspiracy, which husband became involved with.

programme.title: Ten Me
programme.desc: While in their early twenties, a medical school student, Oh Chang-min, and a dietitian, Oh Jin-hee, fall in love and marry despite his family's strong opposition. Chang-min comes from a family of wealthy doctors who believe Jin-hee is not good enough for him.

programme.title: Hide & seek
programme.desc: The Tangled Fates Of The Heiress Of A Cosmetics Company And A Woman Who Had To Achieve Everything On Her Own.

programme.desc: A temporary teacher at an elementary school realizes that one of her students is being abused at home by her family.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.desc: Michelle dives into a high-pressure, two-day crash course in professional paintball, learning to shoot, move, and strategize alongside elite athletes, all in preparation for a competitive 3v3 tournament match.

programme.desc: Michelle train as a flight attendant to learn how to handle emergency fires, rapid decompression, evacuation procedures, and survival skills for extreme situations.

programme.title: I Tried Etiquette School

programme.title: I Tried Delivering A Baby

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.6
programme.desc: Do Hyun can't stop thinking about Ri Jin, which only fuels Se Gi's jealousy. Eventually, Se Gi warns him, “If you touch my woman, yours will be in danger.” Provoked, Do Hyun goes to Ri Jin and asks her to become his secret personal doctor.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.7
programme.desc: Tae Im questions Director Ahn about the reason for Do Hyun's return to Korea, leaving him flustered. Ri Jin struggles to stop Yo Seob from taking his own life. Hwa Ran orders someone to find Min Seo Yeon's long-lost child, while Do Hyun begins strategizing to meet the mysterious writer Omega.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.8
programme.desc: Gi Joon proposes to Chae Yeon, but she gets angry at his attitude. Ri Jin agrees to be Do Hyun's secret doctor, but is shocked to learn she has to live in the same house as him. Thus begins their uneasy and awkward cohabitation.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.9
programme.desc: Ri Jin encounters all of Do Hyun's personalities in one night — except for Shin Se Gi. Gi Joon and Chae Yeon are stunned when Ri Jin shows up at the company as Do Hyun's secretary, while Ri On meets Do Hyun under his secret identity as Writer Omega.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.10
programme.desc: Se Gi declares all-out war against Do Hyun, and Ri Jin is taken aback by his icy demeanor. Chae Yeon is startled when Se Gi suddenly appears before her. When Se Gi arrives at the company, all eyes turn to him, and he even confronts Gi Joon directly. Meanwhile, Hwa Ran meets Ri Jin and tells her to report everything Do Hyun does.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.11
programme.desc: Tae Im faints in shock after seeing Se Gi on the hospital CCTV in Cha Jun Pyo's room. Ri Jin decides to leave home, and Ri On reluctantly lets her go. Meanwhile, Se Gi demands that Ri Jin choose between him and Do Hyun, but Ri Jin retorts, “Then show me what makes you special.”

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Juggler
programme.desc: Super Hungry" is a comedic adventure showcasing Jerry's insatiable appetite and Jane's playful attempts to feed him. Jane's idea of using "Hunger Syrup" leads to unexpected consequences as Jerry accidentally consumes the entire bottle, causing his hunger to intensify. A hilarious chase ensues as Jerry devours everyt_hing in sight, leaving Jane both amazed and exhausted. With a clever twist involving chili and a bucket of water, Jerry's hunger is finally satiated, resulting in laughter and relief for both characters

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: Lazy
programme.desc: JaneandJerryarepackingandkeepingfruits,bottle,hat,toys,clothesinsideapicnicbasket.Thentheygooutsidethehouse

programme.title: KC! Raceway
programme.desc: Join the gamers in their first chall_hine of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers race to victory and earn their first round of points

programme.title: Santa
programme.desc: Jerry's boredom during a board game leads to a playful adventure. Jane introduces him to puzzle mazes, and they solve them together, enjoying the chall_hine. Jerry surprises Jane by creating a real-life maze using household items, leading to a joyful exploration where they navigate the maze together. They find their way out, celebrate their accomplishment, and eagerly enter the maze again, _hinting at more exciting adventures to come

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Cindrella
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Box Yourself

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster merge into Robo and set a trap for a rogue UFO that' s abducted baby cars from the beach.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Time to merge! A " ghost" has stolen cakes from the cake-eating competition, Rodeo and Booster get ready to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to catch Zitron after he steals Billy' s pipes. Matilda the Police Car helps them.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.desc: Chevys in the Smokies and Corvette Expo become one in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee.

programme.title: LOKAR Car Show
programme.desc: The gathering of Ford Mustangs happens in Sevierville, Tenn.

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt
programme.desc: To kick off this season of Inside Masters of Dirt, you'll get to know the legendary M.O.D riders, their stories, and the iconic Vienna shows that forged their legacy as the world's wildest athletes.

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt
programme.desc: In Beirut, the Masters of Dirt crew prepare to put on yet another epic show in the Middle East. But even in the hottest countries - when it rains, it pours! See why this tour stop goes down as one of the most challenging in recent M.O.D history!

programme.title: Geared Up
programme.desc: An ultra rare 1957 Mercedes Benz 300 SL Roadster is resto-modded using a modern Mercedes Benz SLK 230 as a donor vehicle.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga
programme.desc: Wayland Campbell and Levi Shirley go head to head leading to the championship but there is an outsider Randy Slawson, 2 time champion to never under-estimate.

programme.title: The Flying Kestrel
programme.desc: At Santa Pod raceway, engineer and driver Jon Webster reveals the final Flying Kestrel to Joel and Nigel McNully, he gives them a tour around the finished car and shows them all the changes he has made, all to hopefully get a land speed record.

programme.title: Gymkhana Grid Profiles
programme.desc: 3-time rear wheel drive Gymkhana Grid champion Luke Woodham is defending for a fourth title. His biggest rival Adam Elder is doing everything he can to win.

programme.title: Gymkhana Grid Profiles
programme.desc: Road to Gymkhana Grid: 100% pure adrenalin! Profiling 8 of the sport's top drivers, we see into their minds and the mental preparation needed to compete.

programme.title: Our Auto Expert
programme.desc: Nik explores the Mazda CX30 Turbo and Toyota 4Runner. He highlights the 2022 VW IDA and off-roads in the Hyundai Santa Cruz. Hopes are high for the Lexus LF-Z Concept Electric.

programme.title: Our Auto Expert
programme.desc: Nik praises the 2021 Lincoln Aviator GT Hybrid. Mike showcases the 2021 Audi Q5. Nik explains Jeep's luxury transformation of the Wagoneer. He tests the hands-free drive of the 2022 Chevy Bolt SUV.

programme.title: Our Auto Expert
programme.desc: Nik explores BMW's electrified future. Mike off-roads in the Nissan Titan Pro-4X. Cadillac shines with the new Escalade. Nik highlights Toyota Tundra's value. He enjoys the Jeep Wrangler Rubicon 392.

programme.title: MTB Heroes
programme.desc: A Canadian MTB adventurer explores Madagascar and shows the behind the scenes processes of making a film.

programme.title: MTB Heroes
programme.desc: An Irish MTB pro rider discovers and rides the most amazing trails that Norway has to offer from the mountains to the ocean.

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World & European Championship
programme.desc: The third round, the Grand Prix of Germany, takes us to the town of St. Wendel in the Saarland region.

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World & European Championship
programme.desc: Round 4, the Grand Prix of Hungary, takes us to the town of Visonta in the north-eastern part of the country.

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World & European Championship
programme.desc: Busca in the Piemonte region of Italy is the location of the fifth round of this year's competition.

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World & European Championship
programme.desc: The teams head to Mettet in the Wallonia region in Belgium for the seventh and final round of the 2025 season, the Grand Prix of Belgium.

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World & European Championship
programme.desc: For Round 6, the S1GP of Nations, the teams head to Vysoké Mýto in the Czech Republic.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: Cuando la ambición supera la capacidad de conducción y cuando los profesionales de las carreras, bien asegurados, salen de la curva, entonces estamos allí con la cámara. Acrobacias impresionantes de pilotos profesionales y bofetadas de balas metálicas de gran potencia. Escenas espectaculares en las que nadie sale perjudicado.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: With the M3, BMW brought race car technology to the road. In addition: 120 years of Mercedes-Benz motorsports history. And: turbo power in the DTM. The Ford Sierra RS Cosworth taught its racing competition the meaning of fear.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The year 1964 marked Opel's foray into the upper class market. The company presented its KAD series with the Kapitän, Admiral and Diplomat models, combining US design with solid German technology.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The BMW 507 Roadster was cherished by superstars like Elvis Presley. Today, the 150 HP sports car from 1955 is one of the most valuable classics of all time. Also: following the footsteps of the iconic Porsche brand in a 356 Cabrio.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Cars like the Ford GT 40, the Jaguar D-Type or the Mercedes 300 SL wrote history on the race track and now break records at auctions. A sumptuously restored 300 SL will start at the most famous classic car rally in the world, the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: We followed the restoration of the unique Bayer K67 research vehicle, the first all-plastic car in the world, developed in 1967 by the pharmaceutical giant Bayer.

programme.title: BMW 328 Schlüter
programme.desc: Este BMW 328 Schlüter é absolutamente único

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 1 of 5)

programme.title: The Truth About
programme.desc: Michael Jordan first danced for the Chicago Bulls in 1998. Ágnes Keleti dominated the Melbourne Olympic Games in 1956. And India stunned the world with victory at the 1983 cricket World Cup.

programme.title: GOAT
programme.desc: Jordan's Bulls, Bill Russel's Celtics, Magic's Lakers or the Warriors at three points? Who is the best NBA team of all time?

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: The organiser of the 1976 German GP, Ayrton Senna and Alain Prost meet in Japan and Renault puts its life in play under the spotlight.

programme.title: Foul Play

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Two stars of Australian tennis meet on their native soil, Australian cyclist Cadel Evans wins the Tour de France and the collision which started everything for Alain Prost and Ayrton Senna.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The top 10 of football's most passionate fans.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Canelo Alvarez is one of the best boxers, but when he fought Gennady Golovkin, he proved that he was much more than that.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: In this episode, we must first descend the slopes of the Himalayas by mountain bike and then head to Romania for a 4x4 race in the Carpathians called the SuperKarpata Trophy.

programme.title: The Truth About
programme.desc: Naomi Osaka won the 2018 US Open, but the beaten finalist Serena Williams stole the show. Andy Ruiz Jr should not have faced Anthony Joshua in 2019, but he left the Madison Square Garden as world heavyweight champion.

programme.title: The Iconic

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: The Great Escapes
programme.desc: Dive into a world of action, drama, determination and courage while reliving the greatest escape stories of our time in an all new mini-series ‘The Great Escape'.The show is based on true events and takes you on a thrilling ride of the most daring escapes from Indian history. Some of the stories covered in the series include Sushmita Banerjee's escape from the Taliban in Afghanistan, Dalai Lama's escape from Tibet, the story of a daring jailbreak by the inmates of a jail in Punjab, and Indian prisoner-of-war Nihal Singh and Ram Chander Yadav's escape from the clutches of the Chinese in the Indo-China war. The mini-series even has some comments from the people who made these exhilarating escapes, including the Dalai Lama himself. Each episode takes you to different locations across varied time periods. The stylizations of those eras, mixed with the thrill of escape keeps you hooked till the end.

programme.title: Jugaad Mania
programme.desc: Jugaad Mania is a show that highlights how common people come up with out of the box solutions, to cater to various needs and challenges they face in their life. Innovators will explore the reasons, challenges faced and the circumstances which led them to the specific invention / innovation.

programme.title: Saamagri Sampatti Aur Sauda
programme.desc: Saamagri Aur Sampatti is an animated series detailing the journey of various commodities that shaped India's history through their trade, usage, and spread. The history of a few key commodities for India, such as pepper, silk, coffee, and cotton, are covered in this fascinating 9-episode series.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.desc: Believe it or not, many scuba divers want to see great whites up close, and photographers want dramatic shots. But how do you get the sharks to where you want them? programme.desc: Believe it or not, many scuba divers want to see great whites up close, and photographers want dramatic shots. But how do you get the sharks to where you want them? programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Tiger sharks are responsible for more attacks on humans than any other shark aside from the great white. But do they actively prey on humans at beaches, or are these just chance encounter?

programme.title: Animal Society

programme.title: Safari Flix

Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Yuck! What Creature Made This Slime?!
programme.desc: Mystery slime appears on the forest floor—what creature left it behind? The team investigates this sticky situation.As part of #CampYouTube, Mark builds a tide pool aquarium and fills it with sea creatures from the coast—perfect for learning from home.

programme.title: For the Love of Wolves!
programme.desc: Wolves need our help. Coyote partners with conservationists to share the story of these vital predators and how to support their future.

programme.title: Caught! Dangerous, Blue, & Bloated!
programme.desc: Coyote pulls up a strange, bloated blue creature from the water. Is it dangerous or just misunderstood? The team investigates.Coyote faces the GIANT silk caterpillar, whose spiny body delivers a nasty sting. Pain, science, and stunning slow-motion footage await.

programme.title: You Won't Believe This Sailfish Catch!
programme.desc: Coyote reels in a record-breaking sailfish and takes viewers on a high-seas journey filled with education, adrenaline, and ocean conservation.Looks can be deceiving. Dumb cane, a common plant, releases chemicals that scorch skin. Coyote finds out the hard way.

programme.title: Stung by the Dragon Flame Caterpillar!
programme.desc: The dragon flame caterpillar may be tiny, but its sting is fiery. Coyote gets up close—and pays the price.Even plants can pack a punch. Coyote explores a Costa Rican bush with stinging leaves that deliver an unexpectedly sharp pain.

programme.title: Snapped by World's Fastest Jaws!
programme.desc: Mark demonstrates the power of nature's fastest jaws—those of the trap-jaw ant. The slow-motion footage is as impressive as the speed.What's a mud dauber wasp? A surprisingly painful stinger! Mark shows how this lesser-known species defends its nest.

programme.title: Monster Ant Chews to the Bone!
programme.desc: A monster ant with a bite that could rival its name. Mark tests its jaws and explores its defense mechanisms in this up-close challenge.Why does parrot blood look so strange? Coyote analyzes its color, chemistry, and what secrets it may hold about avian evolution.

programme.title: Stung by a Bullet Ant! (Truth Revealed)
programme.desc: At long last, the bullet ant returns! Mark faces this infamous insect again to reveal updated insights into its sting—and why it's feared globally.Can gloves actually stop a venomous snake bite? Coyote puts bite-proof gear to the test against real fangs.

programme.title: Pinched by an Elephant Beetle!
programme.desc: The elephant beetle is huge, but its pinch may be even bigger. Coyote gets a close-up grip and tests its impressive strength.Coyote samples the infamous snake fruit. With a bizarre smell and unexpected flavor, it's a taste test that challenges more than just the tongue.

programme.title: Bullet Ant Challenge – Will It Sting?!
programme.desc: The ultimate challenge—Coyote revisits the infamous bullet ant to find out if the sting is truly as bad as legends say. Pain scale off the charts.Did Coyote really find a dinosaur? He uncovers a bizarre modern-day creature that looks like it crawled straight out of the Jurassic era.

programme.title: Ultimate Frog Scavenger Hunt!
programme.desc: Can Coyote catch every frog species in one day? This amphibian-packed episode follows a wild scavenger hunt in a lush ecosystem.A tiny puppy is covered in ticks. Coyote and team work quickly to remove them and explain the dangers of tick-borne illnesses.

programme.title: 24Hr Snake Hunt – The Clock Is Ticking!
programme.desc: One full day, one big mission—find a rare snake. Coyote races the clock to locate and document an elusive species before time runs out.Flying bullet ants sound bad—and they are. Mark takes on this airborne nightmare in a high-flying, high-pain sting test.

programme.title: Stung and Bit! Bullet Ant vs. Soldier Ant
programme.desc: What's worse—bitten or stung? Mark tests both by taking a bullet ant sting and a soldier ant bite back to back.Would you drink a smoothie made from puke fruit? Coyote samples this notoriously disgusting treat in the name of curiosity and culture.

programme.title: Frog Scavenger Hunt! – Can I Catch Them All?
programme.desc: How many frog species can Coyote catch in one day? This scavenger hunt is a race against time and terrain across wetlands and forests.Costa Rica's most dangerous pit viper is milked for venom in this nerve-racking episode. Coyote shows the precision it takes to stay safe.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.sub-title: Design_en - The new Porsche 911 GT3 R - Design
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID
programme.sub-title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz - How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.sub-title: Digitalized lighting technologies in the Audi A8
programme.desc: Light technology is steadily creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization raises the customer experience to a whole new level.

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Product Highlights_en
programme.sub-title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

programme.title: Hispano Suiza showcases its history in the Peralada Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of Hispano Suiza is showcased, for the very first time, in the Peralada Castle Museum (Girona, Spain) where visitors will be able to contemplate the past and present of the legendary car brand founded in 1904 by Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt. The Hispano Suiza Room will close the usual tour of the Peralada Castle Museum. After years of researching to gather the largest number of pieces and objects related to its history, Hispano Suiza becomes part of this important collection. The Hispano Suiza exhibition encompasses a journey through various decades: from the beginning of the 20th century, when Hispano Suiza was founded, to the present day. After passing through a luxurious hall, the public will be able to visit a recreation of the offices of Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt, where countless business and technical ideas, emerged and took shape, turning Hispano Suiza into a point of reference, for luxury, comfort and technical solutions. In this area, the original painting 'Dame with a mink' by Ramon Casas takes pride of place: it was used as an illustration on the company's original shares.

programme.title: TechDay Digital Light
programme.sub-title: Digital Future Lighting - TechDay Digital Light - Digital Future Lighting
programme.desc: Safety and customer satisfaction come first at Audi. They are part and parcel of the success of the company with the four rings. In that context, light technology is steadily growing more important and creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization is making all of this possible. It is particularly visible in the new Audi A8: the forward-looking Digital Matrix LED headlights and digital OLED rear lights raise the customer experience to a whole new level: for the first time in any Audi model, light is completely digitized. The car can be individualized even further through its digital OLED rear lights. The Digital Matrix LED headlights also include three new functions: advanced traffic information, a lane light with direction indicator lights on highways, and an orientation light on country roads. These features not only demonstrate Audi's “Vorsprung durch Technik,” they also add value.

programme.title: 2022 Peugeot 308
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Peugeot 308 - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The sixth generation Opel/Vauxhall Astra and third generation Peugeot 308 are both based on the Stellantis EMP2 platform and, unsurprisingly, score very similarly across all four areas of assessment. Both the offset test and the full-width crash test highlighted marginal chest injury protection for average male and small female drivers, and neither car was equipped with a centre airbag for far-side crash protection, a countermeasure which is increasingly common on modern cars. Both cars offer plenty of crash avoidance technology but do not include some of the latest advancements introduced in the market. The cars' four-star ratings apply also to their PHEV variants.

programme.title: 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The fully electric Volvo C40 Recharge has been awarded a five-star safety rating in the 2022 Euro NCAP tests, joining its siblings in the Volvo Cars line-up as one of the safest cars on the road today. The rating continues Volvo Cars' five-star streak in Euro NCAP testing, as all tested Volvo models on sale today received five stars in their respective Euro NCAP assessments. The C40 Recharge scored especially well on occupant safety and driver assist systems, helped by one of the most extensive standard safety offers in its segment. Among many other scenarios, these safety technologies help drivers detect and avoid collisions, remain in their lane and reduce the impact of accidentally running off the road.

programme.title: Volvo Cars and Epic Games bring real-time photorealistic visualisation
programme.desc: To offer its customers the best possible user experience, Volvo Cars is bringing photorealistic visualisation technology into its next generation of electric cars through a new collaboration with Epic Games. The companies are teaming up to bring Epic's Unreal Engine game engine into upcoming Volvo cars, providing unparalleled high-quality graphics inside the cabin. Epic Games is a leading interactive entertainment and software company probably best known for Fortnite, one of the world's largest games. Epic Games also develops Unreal Engine, widely considered to be the most advanced real-time 3D creation tool used in various industries beyond games, and which will now be used by Volvo Cars for developing digital interfaces inside its cars and rendering real-time graphics in the car.

programme.title: Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a high-precision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a three-dimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This high-precision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: 2022 BMW 2 Series Coupé

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. programme.title: USA Through Film 2
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city's heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There's this ‘all senses on overload' side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”
